deep_model_path_diagnostics.likely_root_cause: no failing layer detected in requested ladder

visibility_audit.objective_note: objective coefficients are reported for audit; objective does not determine feasibility alone

one_snapshot_deep.likely_root_cause: PowerModels/FlexPlan formulation mismatch requiring deeper IIS/manual bound inspection

active_path_dcline_call_audit.classification: standard PowerModels bus-wise active balance with standard dcline variables and loss equations
active_path_dcline_call_audit.recommended_minimal_fix: Keep active CAPEXP on standard `variable_dcline_power`, `constraint_dcline_power_losses`, and per-bus `constraint_power_balance`; do not add dcline setpoint constraints.

constraint_family_ablation.likely_root_cause: not storage; inspect generator/block dispatch bounds, branch/dcline balance, or units

sample_dclines.sign_convention_note: positive term in each bus KCL lhs; opposite direction represented by opposite arc variable
positive term in each bus KCL lhs; opposite direction represented by opposite arc variable
positive term in each bus KCL lhs; opposite direction represented by opposite arc variable

storage_state_feasibility_check_from_las.note: This checks the last-feasible dispatch against the one-snapshot initial-state equation. It is not an IIS; it identifies whether that dispatch can satisfy storage dynamics.

storage_state_diagnostic.recommended_model_fix: Candidate storage-state becomes feasible when ratings are derived from n_block_max*block sizes.

storage_state_equation_audit.final_state_policy: not active in the one-snapshot first-snapshot branch; when called elsewhere it is a lower bound to the storage data field `energy`, not an equality
storage_state_equation_audit.initial_equation: se[t] = (1-self_discharge_rate)^time_elapsed * energy + time_elapsed*(charge_efficiency*sc[t] - sd[t]/discharge_efficiency + stationary_energy_inflow - stationary_energy_outflow)

standard_dcline_support_audit.dcline_limits_mode: DCPPowerModel uses bounds set by variable_dcline_power; explicit dcline bound templates are not dispatched for DCP in this PowerModels version.
